pred_reason: The contract contains integer overflow/underflow vulnerabilities in arithmetic operations and uses unsafe external calls without proper state change ordering. These correspond directly to SWC-101 (Integer Overflow and Underflow) and SWC-107 (Reentrancy) vulnerabilities. Evidence: Integer overflow/underflow found in multiple locations including _tokenIds.increment() and NFTNum++ operations; State changes occur after external calls violating Checks-Effects-Interactions pattern; Unsafe arithmetic operations identified in Counters library without proper unchecked block usage

These correspond directly to SWC-101 (Integer Overflow and Underflow) and SWC-107 (Reentrancy) vulnerabilities.
